title: FrogJam
body:
Makes frogs play the Minecraft Live 2022 background music on loop. This took me two hours, enjoy.

# Requires:
- Minecraft 1.19.2
- Fabric 0.14.9
- Fabric API 0.62.0

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/aBHSpX8IPUw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
